tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mild normocytic, normochromic anemia (low hemoglobin) with otherwise normal red cell indices. Leukocyte and platelet counts are within normal limits, but platelet distribution width is elevated, which may indicate increased platelet size variability, possibly due to reactive or age-related changes. No acute hematological abnormalities detected; clinical correlation recommended.

display.value: Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction

text.div: Provider Organization: Presidio ospedalieri G. Castelli
